translation_text: When the people do not fear what they ought to fear, that which is their great dread will come on them.
translation_text_raw: When the people do not fear what they ought to fear, that which is their great dread will come on them.

translation_text: Let them not thoughtlessly indulge themselves in their ordinary life;
translation_text_raw: Let them not thoughtlessly indulge themselves in their ordinary life;

chinese_text: 無厭其所生。夫唯不厭，是以不厭。
translation_text: let them not act as if weary of what that life depends on. It is by avoiding such indulgence that such weariness does not arise.
translation_text_raw: let them not act as if weary of what that life depends on. It is by avoiding such indulgence that such weariness does not arise.

translation_text: Therefore the sage knows (these things) of himself, but does not parade (his knowledge);
translation_text_raw: Therefore the sage knows (these things) of himself, but does not parade (his knowledge);

translation_text: loves, but does not (appear to set a) value on, himself.
translation_text_raw: loves, but does not (appear to set a) value on, himself.

translation_text: And thus he puts the latter alternative away and makes choice of the former.
translation_text_raw: And thus he puts the latter alternative away and makes choice of the former.
